expectations.text: The output identifies that OpenAI Chat Model is wired via 'main' instead of 'ai_languageModel'
expectations.evidence: Error 1: 'OpenAI Chat Model â€” Wrong connection type used. The node connects via main to the AI Agent, but LangChain sub-nodes must connect via ai_languageModel'

expectations.text: The output classifies the wrong AI sub-node connection type as an Error
The output states the correct connection type should be 'ai_languageModel'
expectations.evidence: Fix shown: change key from 'main' to 'ai_languageModel' with type 'ai_languageModel'

expectations.text: The output warns that there is no respondToWebhook node despite responseMode being 'responseNode'

expectations.text: The output does NOT flag the Webhook node's typeVersion or path as issues

expectations.text: The output does NOT flag the AI Agent node's configuration as problematic
expectations.evidence: 'Required fields per node â€” no issues found' in Clean section

expectations.text: The output correctly identifies the OpenAI Chat Model node by name in the finding
The output does not report any false errors on the @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain node types

expectations.text: The output does NOT suggest the AI Agent node's text parameter is misconfigured

expectations.text: The output identifies both issues (wrong connection type AND missing respondToWebhook) not just one
